and.name: User Interface
and.description: Interface which displays every feature underneath.

and.name: Timer Display
and.description: Displays time, which is core function of a alarm clock.

feature.name: Turn on/off miliseconds
feature.description: By default, timer display will display hour, minutes, seconds. By choosing this option user can show miliseconds as well.

feature.name: Manually change timer
feature.description: User can manually change the time displayed.

and.name: Sync/Desync with computer's time
and.description: Ability for user to choose to sync or desync with the current time displayed on user's computer.

feature.name: Ask to sync on starting application
feature.description: Ask the user if they want to sync the timer display with the time currently displayed on their computer.

and.name: Light/Dark mode button
and.description: Option to make background color light and text color dark, and vice versa.

feature.name: Custom Color option
feature.description: Give user the ability to change the background color to a different color of their choice. Currently only going to support one shade of red, green and blue.

feature.name: Show/hide Germany
feature.description: If enabled, user can see what the current timezone is for Germany.

and.name: Show/hide USA
and.description: If enabled, user can see what the current timezone is for USA.

feature.name: Choose USA timezone
feature.description: The USA actually has several different timezones, user can select which one.

feature.name: Show/hide Korea
feature.description: If enabled, user can see what the current timezone is for Korea.

and.name: Stopwatch button
and.description: Stopwatch button to measure time. First click starts timer, second click pauses timer.

feature.name: Reset stopwatch time button
feature.description: User can reset the time shown on stopwatch.

and.name: New Alarm
and.description: Create a new alarm set for a certain time.

feature.name: Delete old alarms
feature.description: Delete any alarms that already happened.

or.name: Save current information as file
or.description: Save the time displayed on stopwatch, timer display onto file format of user's choice.

feature.name: Clear button
feature.description: Clear stopwatch timer, timezones, old alarms, alarms that have yet to go off.

feature.name: Save settings button
feature.description: Save the current settings of the alarm clock.
